_comment: Death image manifest for ComfyUI generation. Maps 28 unique images to 44 death paths.
promptPrefix: GRPZA, pixel art game scene, dark dramatic death scene,
promptSuffix: , detailed pixel art, retro game aesthetic, dark moody atmosphere, dramatic lighting, vignette

falling.prompt: silhouette of a person falling through dark sky past crumbling stone castle walls, wind rushing, dramatic perspective looking down, dark blue sky with distant ground below

drowning.prompt: figure sinking into dark underground pool water, bubbles rising toward dim light above, murky depths below, submerged in cave pool, eerie blue-green underwater glow

petrification.prompt: hand and arm turning to grey stone, petrification curse spreading from fingertips up the forearm, cracks in stone skin, grey stone texture overtaking flesh, magical grey particles

poison.prompt: skull with swirling purple and green poison vapors rising from a dark bottle, toxic fumes, deadly nightshade berries scattered, ominous glow, poisonous mist

collapse.prompt: avalanche of falling wooden beams stone rubble and debris crashing down, collapsing ceiling and shelves, dust clouds, destruction from above, cave-in

guardian.prompt: massive stone golem fist descending from above, enormous enchanted granite guardian hand crushing downward, glowing amber eyes in background, ancient stone texture

filing-death.prompt: razor-sharp papers and filing cards flying through air like blades, bureaucratic forms as weapons, red ink splatter on documents, filing cabinet springing open violently

wizard-death.prompt: arcane magical explosion with glowing runes and symbols, wizard tower interior with shattered potions, purple and blue magical energy burst, scattered spell components

fire.prompt: engulfing flames consuming a medieval kitchen or forge, orange and red fire roaring, sparks flying, intense heat glow, burning wooden beams, fire spreading

swarm.prompt: dark swarm of small creatures pouring forward in a wave, bees and rats flooding out of darkness, overwhelming tide of tiny bodies, swarm engulfing everything

lost.prompt: dark twisted forest path with gnarled trees closing in, dense threatening woods, fog between trees, no way out, claustrophobic forest, overgrown trail disappearing

pit.prompt: dark deep pit viewed from above with sharp metal spikes at the bottom gleaming, stone walls of a cave shaft, darkness below, deadly trap pit

troll.prompt: enormous green troll hand reaching down to grab, massive fingers and thick arm, bridge troll looming from above, rocky gorge below, menacing creature

guards.prompt: two armored castle guards with crossed halberds blocking the way, plate armor glinting, stern professional soldiers, castle courtyard flagstones, imposing military presence

ghost-wrath.prompt: spectral ghost king unleashing wave of freezing cold blue energy, transparent crowned figure with blazing eyes, ghostly force blast, ice crystals forming, ethereal rage

portrait-curse.prompt: ornate painting portrait with glowing green eyes coming alive, magical green light emanating from cursed portrait frame, queen portrait with supernatural glow, haunted painting

clerk-stamp.prompt: giant red rubber stamp marked DENIED descending from above, bureaucratic doom, oversized official stamp with red ink, paperwork and forms scattered, institutional horror

boredom.prompt: skeleton sitting slumped in a wooden waiting room chair, cobwebs on bones, number ticket still in hand, empty waiting room with faded walls, eternal patience

echo-scream.prompt: visible sound waves rippling outward in a cave dome, shattering stalactites, concentric rings of destructive force, acoustic devastation, cracking stone from noise

stalactite.prompt: massive limestone stalactites breaking free and crashing down from cave ceiling, cascade of falling pointed rocks, cave ceiling collapsing, geological disaster

barrier-zap.prompt: crackling electric magical force barrier with bright sparks and lightning arcs, glowing energy wall, hand reaching toward dangerous barrier, warning signs, magical electricity

dungeon-pit.prompt: wooden trap door swinging open beneath feet into darkness below, dungeon floor giving way, hinged door falling open, dark void beneath, medieval trap mechanism

mirror-shatter.prompt: ornate mirror exploding outward into hundreds of flying glass shards, broken reflections in each piece, hall of mirrors cascade destruction, crystalline shrapnel

treasury-trap.prompt: crossbow bolts firing from hidden slots in stone treasury walls, multiple arrows launching simultaneously, ancient security mechanism activated, empty treasure pedestals

waterfall.prompt: rushing underground waterfall in dark cave, water pouring over cliff edge into misty abyss below, underground river plunging downward, roaring cascade in cavern

clock-crush.prompt: massive interlocking brass clock gears grinding together, caught in clockwork mechanism, giant cogs and wheels turning, medieval clock tower interior machinery, mechanical doom

rite-fail.prompt: magical ritual circle on floor glowing angry red, failed spell with curse energy spreading outward, grey petrification wave emanating from broken seal, dark throne room

well-fall.prompt: looking up from deep inside dark stone well shaft, tiny circle of light far above, rough stone walls closing in, black water below, rope dangling broken, claustrophobic vertical tunnel
